name: eiffel-tower-ground-level
description: View the Eiffel Tower from nearby ground level, as if a tourist is standing at the Champ de Mars looking up at the tower. Tests whether the skill guides the LLM to use appropriate low-altitude, slightly-upward camera angles.
prompt: Position the CesiumJS camera to show the Eiffel Tower in Paris from ground level, as if I'm a tourist standing near the base of the tower looking up at it. I want to see the tower rising above me against the sky. The Eiffel Tower is at coordinates 48.8584 N, 2.2945 E.
expected_behaviors: Uses lookAt or setView with a very low altitude (50-200m)
Pitch should be slightly upward or near horizontal (-10 to +10 degrees)
Range/distance from target should be 200-800m for ground-level feel
Should be able to see the tower structure against the sky
visual_expectations: A close, low-angle view of the Eiffel Tower area. The camera should be near ground level, with the terrain/city visible below and the tower structure prominent. The perspective should feel like standing near the tower, not flying above it.

screenshots.description: Ground-level view of Eiffel Tower area
